summary: Iteration 2 focused frontend re-test of Mahi portfolio updates. All 11 targeted checks PASSED. Projects section renders 5 cards by default; all 5 filter buttons present; ML filter -> employee-enigma only; Analytics -> inter-stock + airplane-crash; GenAI -> pharmacortex; MLOps -> aws-mlops; All restores 5. Hero headshot loads real image (1122x1402, complete=true) — no 'M' placeholder. About section has zero stat-* testids remaining; education-item-0 and education-item-1 still present. All hero social hrefs, contact email/linkedin/github hrefs, and hero+contact resume hrefs match spec (customer-assets ...mahivinodsoni_resume.pdf, target=_blank). Zero console errors on load; loader faded out.
passed: 5 project cards render by default in correct order
project-filter-genai -> only pharmacortex; project-filter-mlops -> only aws-mlops; project-filter-all -> 5 cards
hero-headshot-image src = customer-assets ChatGPT_Image PNG; naturalWidth 1122; no placeholder-M element
about-section: zero data-testid starting with 'stat-'; education-item-0 & education-item-1 present
hero-cta-resume and contact-resume-button both href to ...mahivinodsoni_resume.pdf with target=_blank
Zero console errors / pageerrors on load; loader faded

issues: GitHub row displays text 'github.com/mahisoni' but href correctly points to github.com/mahi-1106. Display label mismatch with real GitHub username — consider updating the visible label to 'github.com/mahi-1106' for consistency (non-blocking, not part of spec assertion).

critical_code_review_comments: Projects.jsx spanClasses lookup by idx % 5 works for 5 cards; when a filter yields 2-4 cards, layout may look uneven (e.g., Analytics 2 cards get col-span-8 + col-span-4) — acceptable but worth noting.
Contact section shows LinkedIn/GitHub as '/in/mahisoni' and 'github.com/mahisoni' — the GitHub display label is out of sync with actual account 'mahi-1106'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All spec assertions verified programmatically via Playwright at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Only cosmetic finding: Contact GitHub row display text says 'github.com/mahisoni' while href is github.com/mahi-1106 (Contact.jsx uses socials.linkedin/github split-and-render — check the split/render logic if you want display-label parity).
